DTR  |  Listen to a Classroom Conversation
LCC-HS10-L4-BR300-HSGEO-EXL-IFN-02 | Deck A

The Bentwood Log

Click   🎧   to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a girl and a boy. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer some questions.
Listen to the Conversation
1 QUESTION 1: What are the students comparing in their expedition log?
2 QUESTION 2: Why does the girl choose to focus on bentwood boxes for her log entry?
3 QUESTION 3: What will most likely happen after the students finish talking?

Choose the best answer for each question. You may change your answers before submitting.

Answer all 3 questions to submit.

SMART SUPPORT   Go back to the conversation. Say three things. Say what the students are comparing. Say why the girl picked her container. Say what they decide to do at the end. Say it in order.
CA ELD PI.A.1, PI.A.3, PI.B.5  |  CCSS.MATH.CONTENT.HSG.GMD.A.3  |  HS Math: Geometry
